description_long: This object is a long, curved sword with a single-edged blade, reminiscent of a scimitar or sabre. The blade is slender and tapers to a sharp point, with a gentle curve along its length, suggesting it is designed for slashing. The surface of the blade features subtle decorative patterns or engravings, adding a touch of elegance. The handle is straight with a rounded pommel and a simple crossguard, providing basic hand protection. The entire object appears to be made of metal, with a dark, possibly blackened or blued finish. No sheath or additional accessories are visible.
description: A long, curved, single-edged sword with a dark, engraved blade and a simple crossguard handle.
description_view_0: The sword is seen from the front, showing the full curve of the blade, the decorative engravings, and the crossguard with the rounded pommel.
description_view_1: The sword is viewed edge-on, making the blade appear as a thin line and highlighting its slenderness.
description_view_2: The back of the sword is visible, showing the curve and engravings on the blade, as well as the handle and crossguard.
description_view_3: The sword is again viewed edge-on from the opposite side, emphasizing the thinness of the blade and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, metal, rounded pommel, simple crossguard
